value.rationale: The claim concerns a "Computer use" capability that flags potential prompt injection from on-screen content. This page is about Claude Code's security safeguards. It discusses prompt injection protections in the context of Claude Code (permission system, context-aware analysis, input sanitization, isolated context windows for web fetch, etc.), but it does not mention "Computer use" or any feature that flags prompt injection from on-screen content. The page does not describe the named offering at all.
